name: MB_SMALL_BUNDLE_FIRST_START_POLICY_v1
rules: operator packet must pass zip integrity before extraction
operator packet must contain tracker, pointer copies, command surface, audit packs, live boot guidance, validation evidence
operator packet must expose a full OS locator without requiring the full OS first
failure to replay any declared audit command is DENY
historical evidence stays read-only; small packet is an inspection/bootstrap surface, not a full runtime root
